case_title: ROSA MARGARITA RUIZ BOLAINEZ VS. SU WEI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLAINEZ, ROSA MARGARITA RUIZ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED APR-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEI, SU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SHANNON VANTREE. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLAINEZ, ROSA MARGARITA RUIZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEI, SU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOLAINEZ, ROSA MARGARITA RUIZ AS TO DEFENDANT WEI, SU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
